## Summary

Describe the problem and the user-visible outcome.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm knip`
- [ ] `pnpm audit --audit-level high`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Risk and safety

- [ ] I used synthetic test data and included no real credentials or customer traffic.
- [ ] I documented changes to storage, network requests, credential handling, or defaults.
- [ ] I added tests for new behavior or bug fixes.
